title: White dog notices the bowl
goal: Establish the dog, the bowl, and the bright premium ad world in one instantly readable setup.

title: Dog locks onto the food
goal: End the opening shot with the white dog clearly focused on the bowl, setting up the move toward it.

title: Approach begins
goal: Show the white dog beginning to move toward the bowl with happy anticipation.

title: Dog reaches the bowl
goal: Land the dog close to the bowl so the next shot can cut naturally into the eating action.

title: First bite setup
goal: Frame the white dog lowering to the bowl just before the first bite, keeping identity and food visible.

title: White dog eating
goal: End on the white dog actively eating from the bowl, ready to bridge into the transformation beat.

title: Transformation begins
goal: Anchor the start of the magical coat-color shift while the dog remains in the eating position.

title: Transformation completed
goal: Resolve the visual hook with the same dog now fully black, the transformation reading as elegant and unmistakable.

title: Black dog lifts its head
goal: Show the transformed black dog coming out of the bowl moment into a clear satisfied reaction.

title: Satisfied black dog pose
goal: Hold a polished, calm, healthy-looking black dog pose that clearly registers the result of the transformation.

title: Product frame setup
goal: Introduce the final composition with the black dog beside the pack and bowl in a clean commercial arrangement.

title: Locked end frame
goal: Finish on a simple premium pack shot with the black dog and product both cleanly readable and brandable.
